annotation.text: This is good. I would note though that dumping all the project standards in CLAUDE.md ended up being decreasingly effective as more standards piled up--even though, I would ask claude "how can I get you to remember this so that future agents won't forget?" and it would tell me to stuff the directive in CLAUDE.md (or put it in a user-local memory, which doesn't help across development environments). What ended up working much better was using claude skills to encapsulate standards related to a particular activity domain.
annotation.anchor: Probe the standard. "What does CLAUDE.md say about this?"
